testcase.name: Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC4.1: User submits form and sees success message appear
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC4.2: Success message text is correct
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P1] AC4.3: Success message disappears after 3 seconds
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC5.1: New subscription appears in list immediately after submit
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC5.2: New subscription displays correct name
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC5.3: New subscription displays correct cost
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC5.4: New subscription displays correct due date
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P1] AC3.1: Form fields are cleared after submission
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P1] AC3.2: User can add another subscription immediately
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P1] AC5.5: Multiple subscriptions added rapidly without data loss
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC6.1: Subscription remains in list after page reload
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC6.2: Subscription name persists correctly after reload
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC6.3: Subscription cost persists correctly after reload
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC6.4: Subscription due date persists correctly after reload
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P0] AC7.1: Form does NOT submit if required field is missing
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P1] AC7.2: Validation error appears for missing required field
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P1] AC8.1: Invalid cost (non-numeric) is rejected
Story 3.3: Add Subscription Workflow - E2E (Enhanced) › [P1] AC8.2: Invalid due date (>31) is rejected
Story 3.4 - P0: Real-Time Display Critical Path › P0-E2E-001: Should display new subscription immediately after add (< 100ms)
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-3-4-sorting.spec.ts:84:3 › Story 3.4 - P0: Real-Time Display Critical Path › P0-E2E-001: Should display new subscription immediately after add (< 100ms)
Error: expect(received).toBeLessThan(expected)
Expected: < 150 Received: 259
98 | const actualTime = afterTime - beforeTime; 99 | console.log(`📊 Real-time update took: ${actualTime}ms`); > 100 | expect(actualTime).toBeLessThan(150); | ^ 101 | 102 | // ASSERTION: Empty state is gone 103 | await expect(emptyState).not.toBeVisible(); at C:\Users\Lester Tuazon\Documents\GitHub\BMad-subscription-tracker\subscription-tracker\tests\e2e\story-3-4-sorting.spec.ts:100:24

Error Context: ..\..\test-results\story-3-4-sorting-Story-3--00416-mmediately-after-add-100ms--chromium\error-context.md
attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-3-4-sorting-Story-3--00416-mmediately-after-add-100ms--chromium\trace.zip Usage:
npx playwright show-trace ..\..\test-results\story-3-4-sorting-Story-3--00416-mmediately-after-add-100ms--chromium\trace.zip

testcase.name: Story 3.4 - P0: Real-Time Display Critical Path › P0-E2E-002: Should update without loading state or visual flicker
Story 3.4 - P0: Real-Time Display Critical Path › P0-E2E-003: Should not require page refresh on add
Story 3.4 - P1: Sorting & Real-Time Order › P1-E2E-001: Should sort subscriptions by dueDate after each add
Story 3.4 - P1: Sorting & Real-Time Order › P1-E2E-002: Should maintain insertion order for duplicate due dates
Story 3.4 - P1: Sorting & Real-Time Order › P1-E2E-003: Should re-sort immediately after each add (real-time order)
Story 3.4 - P1: Empty State Transition › P1-E2E-004: Should transition from empty state to populated list
Story 3.4 - P2: Performance & Edge Cases › P2-E2E-001: Should handle rapid subscription adds without lag
Story 3.4 - P2: Performance & Edge Cases › P2-E2E-002: Should handle minimum dueDate=1
Story 3.4 - P2: Performance & Edge Cases › P2-E2E-003: Should handle maximum dueDate=31
Story 3.4 - Accessibility Baseline (Story 3.5 will expand) › ACC-001: Subscription list should be semantic <ul> with <li> items
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] TAB moves focus to Name input field (first focusable element)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] TAB navigates: Name → Cost → DueDate → Add → Cancel
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] Shift+Tab navigates backward through form fields
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] TAB wraps from last element to first (focus cycling)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] TAB skips invisible/hidden elements
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] TAB 20+ times consecutively - no element traps focus
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] Escape key closes modal/dialog (if present)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] Focus indicator visible on Name input (outline ≥ 2px)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] Focus indicator visible on all interactive elements
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] Focus outline has sufficient contrast (≥ 3:1 WCAG Level A)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] Add subscription, then TAB to first list item
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P0] TAB through subscription list items in order
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P1] Tab order respects DOM order (no tabindex > 0)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P1] Success message announces automatically via aria-live
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (ATDD Red-Phase) › [P1] Enter key submits form (alternative to clicking button)
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.1: should allow user to enter subscription name in name field
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.2: should allow user to enter monthly cost in cost field
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.3: should allow user to enter due date (day of month) in due date field
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.4: should display placeholder text in name field
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.5: should clear all fields when user clicks Clear button
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.6: should submit form when user clicks Add Subscription button
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.7: should not show errors when submitting with valid data
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.8: should allow keyboard navigation between fields using Tab
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.9: should submit form when user presses Enter on last field
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.10: should display label for name field
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.11: should allow focus on name field using keyboard
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.12: should show visual focus indicator on focused elements
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.13: should have proper label association for screen reader
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.14: should display three input fields when form renders
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.15: should display Add Subscription submit button
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.16: should display Clear reset button
SubscriptionForm Component › UBS-3.1.17: should display form with proper layout
SubscriptionList Display (ATDD - Story 3.2) › [P0] should display empty state when no subscriptions exist
SubscriptionList Display (ATDD - Story 3.2) › [P0] should display subscription name in list
SubscriptionList Display (ATDD - Story 3.2) › [P0] should display subscription cost in currency format
SubscriptionList Display (ATDD - Story 3.2) › [P0] should display due date with proper formatting
SubscriptionList Display (ATDD - Story 3.2) › [P1] should display edit button on each row
SubscriptionList Display (ATDD - Story 3.2) › [P1] should display delete button on each row
SubscriptionList Display (ATDD - Story 3.2) › [P0] should render 100+ subscriptions within 100ms
